title: Vežba 38

questions.text:
Nakon razgovora sa Jamesom, Ajlisa je poslala e-mail klijentu. Evo njegovog sadržaja:

Subject: Request for Updated Project Requirements and New Timeline

Dear David,

I hope you're doing well.

I wanted to reach out to confirm the new project requirements following our recent discussions. We've made some adjustments to the timeline due to recent changes and need to ensure we're aligned on the updated requirements before proceeding.

We're proposing a new deadline for the first phase of the project at the end of next month. Please let us know if this works for you or if there are any additional adjustments we should consider.

Additionally, James has sent me the updated project plan, which I've attached to this email for your review. Please take a look and let us know if everything looks good on your end.

Looking forward to your confirmation and any further input you may have.

Best regards,

Alice

Alice anamuomba mteja afanye nini kuhusu mahitaji ya mradi?

answers.feedback: Alice anataja tarehe mpya ya mwisho lakini hasemi wazi kuwa anaiomba idhini yake.

answers.answer: Toa maoni kuhusu mpango mpya wa mradi.
answers.feedback: Alice anaomba mteja akague mpango wa mradi uliosasishwa, lakini ombi la awali si hili.
Alice je zatražila od klijenta da predloži promene.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.
explanation: Nakon linije koja kaže I hope you're doing well., Alice pita klijenta o novom requirements koji imaju. Pogledajte ovu liniju kako biste mogli tačno odgovoriti na ovo pitanje.
